calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-09-2012 Dismissal - No Appearance

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Set For Trial On May-02-12 At 11:30 A.M. In Dept 624

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Continued To May-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Continued To May-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 624
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for Appellant/Defendant, Angela Ma and Ben Lew, who are present in court.
Ora Prochovnick,Esq. for Respondent/Plaintiff, Victoria Carrillo, who is present in court.

This comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. The Parties are affirmed. Parties enter into a settlement agreement, which is not filed with the court at this time. The Court orders this matter continued for one week for dismissal. This matter is continued to May 9, 2012 at 9:00 AM in Department 624.

Judge Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerks Melinka Jones and Jackie Alameda, not reported. (624)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Judgment Entered
